# ashmo.io

> Personal brand website of Ashraf Hassan (Ashmo) — founder, brand builder, and writer with 25+ years of business experience.

## About
Ashmo is the Head of Brand & Growth at FiLLi Cafe, a 70+ outlet cafe chain in the UAE. He has 25+ years of experience spanning retail, brand strategy, marketing, and the AI creator economy. He writes about what real business actually looks like — not the glamour version, the survival version.

## Expertise
- Brand positioning and strategy for F&B and retail businesses
- Cafe growth and scaling (built FiLLi Cafe from 1 outlet to 70+)
- Pricing psychology and merchant intelligence
- AI and creator economy applications for business
- Marketing campaign management (1,000+ Meta ad campaigns)
- Founder mindset, discipline, and habit philosophy

## Content Pillars
- Merchant Mindset: Real business stories from the ground — selling, pricing, reading people
- Brand Building & Cafe Growth: Strategic intelligence behind scaling FiLLi Cafe
- AI & Future of Selling: How AI and creator economy reshape business, from a practitioner's view
- Habit Philosophy: Patience, discipline, and the philosophy of showing up
- Founder Documentary: The real texture of a founder-operator's life
